name: retro-terminal
description: A complete design system rooted in the aesthetic of phosphor-screen terminals, CRT monitors, and command-line interfaces from the 1970s–90s. Every design decision references that world — the glow of a green phosphor dot, the weight of a blinking cursor, the rhythm of a monospace grid.
author: getdrip
signature_traits: Phosphor green #00FF41 with glow — never white text
CRT scanline overlay and vignette mandatory
At least one blinking cursor per primary screen
Typewriter and terminal cursor animation patterns
